body:
We need to find a way to fully support internet search, we should check that search on bing.com, google.com, other search providers, wikipedia we know already works without CORS restrictions, we need to check others from the browser, for that, the fastest way would be to just to use browser from https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/tests, also we can make these tests visual, and as everything can change, we can keep them just in case some of providers or services will lift their restrictions.

Even if other search providers does not work we still can use search via wikipedia by keywords, partial matches, fuzzy matches and formal verification of matches.

We need to make it really work, please don't stop until you make our system search as human would do manually, but programmatically. It should be smart search combining all the search engines, formally fetching the results and actually making reasoning and verification with as detailed and deep reasoning steps as possible. I believe it is possible to do real formal AI according to our vision. Please don't stop until it is done. Double check our vision, and all issues and comments, that are not fully implement, and implement everything for real.

We can treat human language as precursor for formal query language, to allow user do searches, fetch pages and more.

Double check we use github.com/link-assistant/web-capture as much as possible, and also report all missing features for web capture specific to search, it should work with direct requests, API, and even capture of results using actual browser, and also as library web capture should be available inside the browser, so it will be possible to access some or all of websites  using simple fetch and other possibilities.

Also make sure we have local server, that will be available at localhost at WebSocket and WebRTC protocols, that will allow fully local storage of the agent, that will also will be accessible via our CLI in the same way. So CLI should be a server and client, that should provide simple interface for user to work with the formal AI.

Make sure all codebase, docs, and vision are in sync with everything we discussed so far.

We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration.

If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
